paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces SwiGLU activation, parallel Transformer layers, and multi-query attention for improved efficiency and quality at 8B scale.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 780 billion tokens of high-quality text (including multilingual data)
raw_extraction.application: Few-shot natural language understanding, code generation, multilingual tasks, mathematical reasoning, and general-purpose language modeling.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to improve few-shot learning performance across diverse tasks, including reasoning, multilingual understanding, and code generation.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Task-specific supervised fine-tuning (e.g., SuperGLUE, MMLU, BIG-bench)
raw_extraction.extension: Parallel Transformer layers improve training speed by ~15% with negligible quality degradation at 8B scale.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: Demonstrates discontinuous improvements in performance at 62B scale, showing emergent capabilities in reasoning and multilingual tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 780 billion tokens of high-quality text (including multilingual data)
raw_extraction.application: Few-shot natural language understanding, code generation, multilingual tasks, mathematical reasoning, and general-purpose language modeling.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to improve few-shot learning performance across diverse tasks, including reasoning, multilingual understanding, and code generation.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Task-specific supervised fine-tuning (e.g., SuperGLUE, MMLU, BIG-bench)
raw_extraction.extension: Pathways architecture enables efficient scaling by dynamically routing inputs across specialized sub-networks, reducing memory bottlenecks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: First large-scale use of Pathways system to train a 540B parameter model, achieving state-of-the-art few-shot performance on hundreds of tasks, including breakthroughs in reasoning and multilingual capabilities.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 780 billion tokens of high-quality text (including multilingual data)
raw_extraction.application: Few-shot natural language understanding, code generation, multilingual tasks, mathematical reasoning, and general-purpose language modeling.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to improve few-shot learning performance across diverse tasks, including reasoning, multilingual understanding, and code generation.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Task-specific supervised fine-tuning (e.g., SuperGLUE, MMLU, BIG-bench)
raw_extraction.extension: Pathways architecture enables efficient scaling by dynamically routing inputs across specialized sub-networks, reducing memory bottlenecks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the **Pathways Language Model** architecture, which enables efficient scaling of transformer models by parallelizing computations across multiple devices, allowing training of a 540B-parameter model. Achieves state-of-the-art performance on both natural language and code tasks, demonstrating zero-shot and few-shot generalization across diverse domains without explicit task specialization.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus including web documents, books, code (39B code tokens, 2.7B Python tokens), and multilingual data
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, code generation, translation, reasoning, and software engineering tasks (including code synthesis, debugging, and repair).
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models to achieve state-of-the-art performance across natural language and code tasks simultaneously, leveraging cross-task transfer learning and efficiency improvements via the Pathways architecture.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning and supervised fine-tuning for downstream tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Pathways Language Model architecture enables efficient scaling of transformer models by parallelizing computations across multiple devices.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: **PaLM-Coder** extends PaLM via two-stage fine-tuning on code data, achieving state-of-the-art performance on code synthesis (HumanEval, MBPP), code repair (DeepFix), and software engineering tasks. Demonstrates superior code editing granularity and robustness compared to specialized models like Codex.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Same as PaLM (540B) + additional code-specific fine-tuning data (total 46.8B code tokens, 8.7B Python tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Code synthesis, code repair, debugging, and software engineering tasks with high accuracy and minimal edits.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Specialization of PaLM for code-related tasks (synthesis, repair, and debugging) via targeted fine-tuning while retaining general language capabilities.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on code-specific datasets (two-stage fine-tuning: 6.5B tokens of mixed code + 1.9B tokens of Python-focused code)
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: Smaller variant of PaLM designed for more accessible deployment while retaining high performance. Leverages the same Pathways architecture but optimized for lower resource requirements.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale web text corpora including Common Crawl, Wikipedia, books, and other filtered sources
raw_extraction.application: Enterprise applications, cloud-based services, and smaller-scale deployments requiring strong language capabilities
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing scalability and accessibility in large language models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning and supervised fine-tuning for downstream tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: **Pathways** architecture enables efficient training of large-scale models by dynamically routing activations across multiple parallel pathways, reducing compute overhead during training and inference.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (~780 billion tokens, including social media, webpages, books, GitHub, Wikipedia, News, arXiv, math webpages)
raw_extraction.application: Research on advanced NLP tasks, reasoning, code generation, multilingual question answering, and bias/toxicity evaluation.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the impact of training data diversity, scale, and model size on performance across reasoning, multilingual, and code-related tasks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: Extended training with **refreshed data** (avoiding repetition) and **learning rate decay** (1/k scheduling) improves few-shot performance on reasoning, multilingual, and code tasks while mitigating data repetition effects.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Refreshed dataset (~1.325 trillion tokens, adjusted proportions: 40% social media, 27% multilingual webpages, 13% books, 10% GitHub, 4% Wikipedia, 1% News, 5% arXiv/math webpages)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced reasoning, multilingual question answering, code synthesis, and few-shot learning research.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Assessing the benefits of extended training and data refreshment on model generalization and task-specific performance.
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

raw_extraction.innovation: **PaLM-E**: Extends PaLM with multimodal capabilities by integrating visual embedding layers into the language model pipeline, enabling joint processing of text and images.
raw_extraction.application: Visual question answering, image captioning, and multimodal reasoning
raw_extraction.paper_title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways
